Name: Overhead Shadow
Description: Controls shadow rendering from an overhead (typically directional) light source using a dual-range shadow map system. Supports high-detail near shadows and lower-detail distant shadows with configurable biasing and stability options.

Fields.Name: Update Narrow Shadow
Fields.Description: Enables updating of the high-resolution near shadow map. Disable to freeze or reuse previous narrow shadow results for performance.

Fields.Name: Update Broad Shadow
Fields.Description: Enables updating of the low-resolution far shadow map. Disable to reduce cost when distant shadows do not need frequent updates.

Fields.Name: Narrow Shadow: Resolution
Fields.Description: Resolution of the near (high-detail) shadow map. Higher values improve sharpness but increase memory and rendering cost.

Fields.Name: Broad Shadow: Resolution
Fields.Description: Resolution of the far (low-detail) shadow map. Lower values are typically sufficient due to distance-based blur.

Fields.Name: Narrow Shadow: Range
Fields.Description: Distance from the camera covered by the high-resolution shadow map. Objects within this range receive detailed shadows.

Fields.Name: Broad Shadow: Range
Fields.Description: Maximum distance covered by the low-resolution shadow map. Extends shadow coverage beyond the narrow range.

Fields.Name: Depth Offset
Fields.Description: Constant offset applied to shadow depth values to reduce surface spots and self-shadowing artifacts.

Fields.Name: Depth Bias
Fields.Description: Integer depth bias applied during shadow map rasterization to shift depth values away from the light source.

Fields.Name: Slope Scaled Depth Bias
Fields.Description: Bias applied based on surface slope relative to the light direction. Helps reduce artifacts on steep angles.

Fields.Name: Volume Depth
Fields.Description: Depth extent of the shadow casting volume along the light direction. Controls how far shadows are projected downward.

Fields.Name: Shadow Model Cull Flip
Fields.Description: Flips face culling mode during shadow rendering. Useful for correcting shadow artifacts on specific geometry or inverted meshes.

Fields.Name: Align Texel
Fields.Description: Snaps the shadow projection to texel-sized increments to reduce shimmering and improve temporal stability when the camera moves.
